amplify.domain.AppId.Docs: The unique ID for an Amplify app.

amplify.domain.AutoSubDomainCreationPatt.Docs: Sets the branch patterns for automatic subdomain creation.

amplify.domain.AutoSubDomainIAMRole.Docs: The required AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) service role for the Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for automatically creating subdomains.

amplify.domain.DomainName.Docs: The domain name for the domain association.

amplify.domain.EnableAutoSubDomain.Docs: Enables the automated creation of subdomains for branches.
